profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Dunia Virtual Online Tbk provides datacenter services in Indonesia. It operates in three segments: Colocation Services, Teleport Services, and Others. The company offers space for customers to store or entrust its servers; satellite earth station facilities that act as a link between satellites and terrestrial communication networks; and business continuity plan and disaster recovery plan consulting services, and coworking space. PT Dunia Virtual Online Tbk was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Depok, Indonesia.
